micro_rules: Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.

rows.command_eng: Set the living room light to yellow.
Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
Set the brightness of the living room light to 80%.
Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode.
Set the hue of the living room light to 240 and the saturation to 80.
Set all robot vacuum cleaners with even tags to auto mode.
Lock all door locks.
Set the target temperature of the air conditioner in Sector1 to 18 degrees.
Change the air purifier in the bedroom to sleep mode.
Close all valves in the kitchen.
Set the living room light to yellow.
